name: prd-taskmaster
description: Zero-config goal-to-tasks engine for Claude Code (the Atlas engine)

scripts.postinstall: pip install -r mcp-server/requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || echo 'WARN: Python MCP deps not installed. MCP tools will not start. Run: pip install -r node_modules/prd-taskmaster/mcp-server/requirements.txt'
